name: My Crazy World I made with a friend RPG
description:
This is something I did with a friend

Expect me to update this a lot to add more scenarios cause this far from done. There are still so many characters to be added but for now enjoy these two idiots

Also here are the characters and what they can do and what they are based off of

1.Dankey Kong: He is obviously based off of Donkey Kong but is goofy. He somehow has negative IQ. He also can do any parody he wants like turning super sayain and mastering a sword with just one swing and stuff like that. He also has a hint of toon force on his side. He is very careless and gets into trouble you can't imagine how he got in. He also avoids child support be cause he has a son Chronkey Kong. There is also Candy Kong but it's to hard to explain their relationship. Let's just say that Dankey is too dumb to have a relationship with her. He also Will go ballistic if you call him "Monke" (He has a crazy backstory that I don't feel like putting right now so please remind me in the comments if you even care

2. Peppino: Yes, The one from Pizza Tower. Me and my friend got into Pizza tower and for some reason made him a main character. Nothing really changes with other than he has a special weapon that is Dough but he can make pretty much any weapon out of it. But only he can use it cause he mastered how to control it. If someone else tried to use it then it would just seep through their hands like regular dough. He is also Dankey Kong's Homie.

3. Fake Dankey Kong

If you even care about the lore then please type in the comment section. I promise I'll respond and like. I just need ideas and opinions
creator: Its me DustDust Sans. I'm going to kill you, cause I can
